_meta.note: Educational. Forward returns are synthesised house estimates, not forecasts. Domicile drives the tax verdict; where domicile_conf != 'isin'/'curated' treat with a verify flag.

score_method.label: Efficiency Score
score_method.caveat: A transparent efficiency composite for a long-term buy-and-hold starter — NOT a buy recommendation. Blank where TER is not yet source-verified.

components.cost: Lower total annual drag (TER + dividend withholding) scores higher.
components.tax: US estate-tax safety; US-domiciled funds penalised hard.
components.return: Risk-adjusted: net expected return minus a penalty for volatility (return - 0.10 x vol).
components.liquidity: How easily the fund can be traded.
components.breadth: Diversification: broad beta beats single-country or thematic bets.
